name: ambient-tinystyler
description: Local TinyStyler few-shot text style transfer through reusable style profiles.

modelAssets.name: tinystyler-transfer-weights
modelAssets.license: MIT model card. PyTorch pickle weights must be loaded only from this reviewed, declared cache path.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-backbone
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream model terms; needed by TinyStyler inference before applying TinyStyler weights.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-model-weights
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face model asset used to compute style embeddings from user-provided examples.

tinystyler_doctor.description: Report TinyStyler package contract, host/runtime facts, declared model assets, and real-runtime implementation status without downloads.

tinystyler_profile.description: Create a reusable TinyStyler style profile JSON from example texts. Slice 1 supports deterministic fake-runtime contract tests; real embedding extraction lands in the profile slice.

tinystyler_transfer.description: Rewrite source text using a TinyStyler style profile or example texts. Slice 1 supports deterministic fake-runtime contract tests; real generation lands in the transfer slice.
